room.caption: [TD3] No one's really attacking here. This is merely a simulation.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(9) global.partySplit=1 global.bossTrack=102 global.speedMod=1
backFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollow.type=2 backFollow.backSet=backLabyrinthRuinsA backFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; backFollow.yMoveScale=1 backFollow.depth=1499999 backFollow.image_xscale=1.8; backFollow.image_yscale=2
TD_HUD=instance_create(0,0,oTD_HUD) TD_Prog=instance_create(0,0,oEvTowerDefense) TD_Prog.TD_Difficulty=global.bTowerDefense
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(1013) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
